title: Discuss equality of opportunity
subtitle: Same tool, different starting points.
overview: Module: Complex Social and Personal Topics. B2 Hi develops high-B2 independence: layered argument, long-form speaking, deep native input, professional authority, precise style, complex topics, and C1 readiness.

sections.title: B2 hi focus
rows: Equal access to a tool does not always mean equal opportunity.
能使用同一个工具不总是意味着机会平等。
B2 Hi frame: explain context, avoid simple judgments, include human impact, and connect to responsibility or choice.
B2 Hi 框架：解释背景、避免简单判断、包括人的影响，并连接到责任或选择。
Discuss equality of opportunity in education.
讨论教育中的机会平等。
Two learners may have the same app, but one may have quiet time, feedback, and confidence, while the other studies in noise and feels embarrassed to speak.
两个学习者可能有同一个 app，但一个可能有安静时间、反馈和信心，而另一个在噪音中学习，并且不好意思开口。

items.en: Equal access to a tool does not always mean equal opportunity.
items.zh: 能使用同一个工具不总是意味着机会平等。

items.en: B2 Hi frame: explain context, avoid simple judgments, include human impact, and connect to responsibility or choice.
items.zh: B2 Hi 框架：解释背景、避免简单判断、包括人的影响，并连接到责任或选择。

items.en: Two learners may have the same app, but one may have quiet time, feedback, and confidence, while the other studies in noise and feels embarrassed to speak.
items.zh: 两个学习者可能有同一个 app，但一个可能有安静时间、反馈和信心，而另一个在噪音中学习，并且不好意思开口。

items.en: I will make the answer independent, not just correct.
items.zh: 我会让回答独立，而不只是正确。

items.en: A high B2 answer should show structure, judgment, tone control, and real examples.
items.zh: 高 B2 回答应该显示结构、判断力、语气控制和真实例子。

items.en: If my idea is complex, I will guide the listener with clear transitions.
items.zh: 如果我的想法复杂，我会用清楚转场引导听者。

items.en: I can revise for precision without making the language heavy.
items.zh: 我可以为了准确而修改，同时不让语言变沉重。

items.en: This lesson should help me speak and write with more authority and more humility.
items.zh: 这节课应该帮助我更有权威感也更谦逊地说和写。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Discuss equality of opportunity in education.
lines.zh: 讨论教育中的机会平等。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Two learners may have the same app, but one may have quiet time, feedback, and confidence, while the other studies in noise and feels embarrassed to speak.
lines.zh: 两个学习者可能有同一个 app，但一个可能有安静时间、反馈和信心，而另一个在噪音中学习，并且不好意思开口。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more independent and better structured?
lines.zh: 你能让这个回应更独立、结构更好吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the issue, add depth, address a complication, and close with a practical implication.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义问题、加入深度、处理复杂点，并用实际影响收尾。

items.en: Discuss equality of opportunity in education.
items.zh: 讨论教育中的机会平等。

items.en: Answer once in seven or eight sentences with clear transitions.
items.zh: 用七到八句话回答一次，并使用清楚转场。

items.en: Add one high-B2 move: define a term, answer an objection, or qualify the conclusion.
items.zh: 加入一个高 B2 动作：定义术语、回应反对意见或限定结论。

items.en: Record the answer and revise one sentence for precision and natural rhythm.
items.zh: 录下回答，并修改一句话，让它更准确、节奏更自然。

items.en: Keep the revised version as a model for future C1 Bridge practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的版本保留为未来 C1 Bridge 练习的模型。
